recommendations.title: Suck Me Shakespeer
recommendations.overview: Ex-con Zeki Müller goes undercover as a teacher at a below average Gymnasium to find money he'd stashed prior to incarceration.

recommendations.title: Suck Me Shakespeer 2
recommendations.overview: A rowdy teacher accompanies a class trip to Thailand to recover some diamonds accidentally sent there and restore the school's reputation.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Secret
recommendations.overview: Seven friends - three women and four men - meet for dinner. Everyone should put their cell phone on the table. No matter what message comes in - anyone can read it and listen to the phone calls. However, this leads to a lot of chaos.

recommendations.title: Turkish for Beginners
recommendations.overview: During an emergency landing on a deserted island suddenly traumatized by antiauthoritarian education Lena Schneider together with the Turkish Super Macho Cem Öztürk must fight for survival. After initially Cem macho repulsive acts on Lena, a jellyfis

recommendations.title: No manches, Frida
recommendations.overview: After being released from prison, Zequi, a bank robber, sets out to recover money buried by his accomplice; but is horrified to learn that a high school gymnasium is now over the site where the loot is hidden.

recommendations.title: Two Men in Town
recommendations.overview: A former bank robber is released after 10 years in prison. He gets help from a social-worker, but gets harassed by an old cop from his past.

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: Take the Money and Run
recommendations.overview: Virgil Starkwell is intent on becoming a notorious bank robber. Unfortunately for Virgil and his not-so-budding career, he is completely incompetent.

recommendations.title: Buffalo '66
recommendations.overview: Billy is released after five years in prison. In the next moment, he kidnaps teenage student Layla and visits his parents with her, pretending she is his girlfriend and they will soon marry.

recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.
